category_sources: source_facts.description says msmtp is an SMTP client usable as an SMTP plugin for Mutt; official project page presents msmtp as the project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msmtp; official homepage and documentation use msmtp.
docs_sources: Official documentation page links the msmtp manual in HTML and PDF formats plus example configuration.
repo_sources: Official download page says source code is hosted on git.marlam.de and gives the clone command git clone https://git.marlam.de/git/msmtp.git; it also notes a GitHub mirror.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SMTP client and Mutt use; source_facts.executables lists msmtp and msmtpd; official docs provide manual/configuration.
